mapper.select: SELECT 'LESSON' AS source_type, cn.title AS node_title, l.title AS title, COALESCE(NULLIF(l.summary, ''), LEFT(l.content, 500)) AS summary, l.example_code AS example_code, (cn.sort_order * 100 + l.sort_order) AS sort_order FROM learning_progress lp INNER JOIN curriculum_nodes cn ON cn.node_id = lp.node_id INNER JOIN lessons l ON l.node_id = cn.node_id WHERE lp.user_id = #{userId} AND lp.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND cn.level_code = #{levelCode} AND lp.lesson_completed = 1 AND cn.is_active = 1 AND l.is_active = 1 ORDER BY cn.sort_order ASC, l.sort_order ASC, l.lesson_id ASC

SELECT DISTINCT 'PRACTICE' AS source_type, cn.title AS node_title, pp.question AS title, pp.answer_text AS summary, pp.answer_text AS example_code, (cn.sort_order * 100 + pp.problem_id) AS sort_order FROM learning_progress lp INNER JOIN curriculum_nodes cn ON cn.node_id = lp.node_id INNER JOIN practice_problems pp ON pp.node_id = cn.node_id AND pp.subject_id = lp.subject_id WHERE lp.user_id = #{userId} AND lp.subject_id = #{subjectId} AND cn.level_code = #{levelCode} AND lp.practice_passed = 1 AND cn.is_active = 1 AND pp.is_active = 1 ORDER BY sort_order ASC
